positive: A stylized, symmetrical composition featuring a group of whimsical celestial creatures—a glowing nebula dragon, a luminous comet, and constellation-patterned moths—flitting around a central, oversized geometric knotwork design. The style should be reminiscent of intricate mandalas and Art Nouveau linework, with sharp, clean silhouettes and high contrast. Use a limited palette of deep indigo, sapphire blue, brilliant gold, and metallic silver. The lighting should be ethereal and dramatic, casting sharp, jewel-toned glow effects against a matte, dark background. Focus on crisp lines, symmetry, and strong visual impact, perfectly suited for screen printing on apparel.
